title: eriogonum ternatum
intro: Eriogonum ternatum, commonly known as mountain buckwheat or desert buckwheat, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum ternatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Eriogonum ternatum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, with the leaves and roots being used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
